subject: Meeting tomorrow at 2pm
body: Hi, I wanted to confirm our meeting tomorrow at 2pm to discuss Q2 planning. Please let me know if this works for you.

true_label.suggested_reply: Thanks for confirming. Yes, 2pm works well for me. See you tomorrow.

subject: EXCLUSIVE OFFER: 50% OFF NOW!
body: Dear valued customer, THIS IS NOT A DRILL! Get 50% off everything! Click here to claim your deal NOW! Limited time offer!

subject: Report feedback
body: I reviewed the quarterly report you sent. Great work overall, but I have a few suggestions on the financial section. Can we discuss this week?

true_label.suggested_reply: Thanks for reviewing! I'd love to discuss your suggestions. How about Wednesday at 3pm?

subject: Your weekly digest
body: This week in tech: New updates on AI, Cloud computing, and Web3. Read our latest articles at our website.

subject: Action required: Budget approval
body: The Q2 budget needs your approval by end of day Friday. Please review the attached document and confirm.

true_label.suggested_reply: Will review and get back to you by EOD Friday.
